source_label: NbeV1.1 LAB-strain genome, high-confidence CDS subset (Kurotani et al. 2023, Plant and Cell Physiology 64(2):248, PMC9977260; transcripts_h via nbenthamiana.jp/NbenBase)
isoform_policy: longest_isoform_per_gene_locus (scripts/build_codon_profile.py, verified in Job 168 STEP 1 / _analysis/025 STEP 1 — identical policy applied to nbev11_cds_all and qld183_v103)
known_limitations: Source genome strain provenance is described by the original authors as "might be one of the distributed laboratory accessions" — not a 100% confirmed exact match to any single wet-lab partner's specific LAB strain isolate. Currently the closest identified public proxy for the intended LAB-strain context (see _analysis/025).

qld183_v103_derived (Ranawaka et al. 2023, Nature Plants 9(9):1558-1571) remains a valid genome-derived comparison/sensitivity-analysis reference but was withdrawn as the canonical migration candidate due to wild-accession (QLD183) vs LAB-strain mismatch.

nbev11_cds_all_derived (same source genome, unfiltered gene set) is empirically near-identical to this high-confidence subset (overall GC 43.11% vs 42.76%, <0.4pt difference) — this asset was selected over _all on theoretical annotation-quality grounds, not because of a measured material difference.

not_authoritative_build_scripts.reason: Expression-weighted ML prototype script; requires expression input (quant.sf/TPM) and produces CSV output, not the current production JSON format. Not used for this asset.

claim_boundary: This codon table is a configured in-silico FactorForge reference for codon-usage scoring and optimization, genome-derived from a high-confidence N. benthamiana gene model subset. It is not experimental validation or comparative biological-performance evidence. AT-rich native composition is not equivalent to improved performance.
promotion_note: Job 168 / v3.3.0 (_analysis/025): promoted experimental_candidate -> official_packaged after STEP 4 passed in full — production-path consistency check (metrics/reverse_translator/rule_engine/domesticator/CLI/Python API/REST), host-isolation verification (BY-2 confirmed independent of this band), benchmark provenance matrix, registry<->manifest<->active_codon_reference.json sha256 synchronization tests, pytest evidence, and public-surface audit. v3.2.8 remains the rollback/stable legacy-reference release. v3.3.0 activates this asset as the current N. benthamiana production software default with public API/UI overrides unsupported and comparator assets hidden from public product selection. Limitations carried forward unchanged: not wet-lab validation; exact source LAB-strain accession identity not 100% confirmed (see known_limitations); intended for LAB-strain-oriented N. benthamiana design, not a universal N. benthamiana optimum.
